name: VTIL_ResetDelayedRxMessage
title: VTIL_ResetDelayedRxMessage
syntax: long VTIL_ResetDelayedRxMessage(dword pgn, dword sourceAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue, dword behavior); // form 1
description: Resets the change of a single VTIL_DelayRxMessage call. The corresponding message is specified by PGN, source address, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: Use same value as in VTIL_DelayRxMessage to stop manipulation of the message.
